name: Accesso Guest Experience Technology API
what_it_does: Accesso REST API for attractions and entertainment venue technology platform. Enables AI agents to manage ticket sales and inventory, handle virtual queuing (LoQueue) and wait time data, process point-of-sale transactions, access guest profiles and visit history, manage season pass and membership programs, retrieve venue analytics, and integrate ticketing data with marketing and loyalty systems.
use_cases: Managing ticket and pass sales from attractions booking agents
Retrieving virtual queue and wait time data from guest experience agents
Processing POS transactions from venue operations agents
Accessing guest profiles and season pass data from loyalty management agents
not_for: Non-attraction venues without theme park or resort ticketing workflows
Standard e-commerce without physical venue access control
Hotels without attraction or entertainment venue integration
best_when: A theme park, ski resort, or attraction venue using Accesso wants AI agents to automate ticket sales, virtual queue management, guest experience personalization, and loyalty program integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Ticket pricing and access control errors have direct revenue impact. Physical safety considerations apply to queue and capacity management automation.

auth.notes: Accesso uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Venue-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Multiple product lines (Passport, LoQueue, Siriusware, ingresso) have separate API surfaces.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise attractions technology pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-venue enterprise contracts; transaction fee models on ticketing
pricing.notes: UK company (London), public on AIM/LSE. Global attractions technology leader. Portfolio includes Passport eCommerce, LoQueue virtual queuing, Siriusware ski POS, and ingresso ticketing distribution. 1,000+ venue clients.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLAs for high-volume venues

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Ticket pricing and capacity control errors have revenue and safety implications
No public MCP server — REST API with partner program
Multiple product lines with separate APIs — clarify which Accesso product to integrate
UK company — GDPR compliance; UK/EU data residency default
Queue management automation has physical safety implications — implement conservative guardrails
No webhooks — requires polling for queue and transaction data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest payment and venue access data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with venue-level scoping. UK/US/EU data residency. UK-based global platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest payment and attraction access data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. UK/US/EU data residency. UK-listed global attractions company.
